goal: Remove repo-local docs/domain PPP references and standardize expert knowledge sourcing on external Obsidian wiki scopes with global pride-pppar-expert precedence.
acceptance_summary: Removed repo-local docs/domain PPP references, switched pppar_expert_agent to Obsidian-first wiki routing, and froze PPP family knowledge sourcing to external expert-system wiki scopes with raw PRIDE fallback only.
